author: EnigmaCom
description: ProBot-style welcome notices with image cards, rich embeds, and full event coverage (join, leave, ban, unban). Fully configurable per event with per-guild channels, message pools, DM whispers, and custom accent colors.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not persistently store data or metadata about users.
install_msg: Thanks for installing! Enable with `[p]welcome toggle` and set a channel with `[p]welcome channel #channel`. Run `[p]help welcome` for the full command list.
name: Welcome
short: ProBot-style welcome image cards and event notices for join, leave, ban, and unban.
